name: airiq-smart-city-platform
description: AirIQ smart-city air quality intelligence and response platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @airiq/api" "npm run dev -w @airiq/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @airiq/api && npm run build -w @airiq/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @airiq/api && npm run test -w @airiq/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @airiq/api && npm run test:coverage -w @airiq/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @airiq/api && npm run lint -w @airiq/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @airiq/api && npm run typecheck -w @airiq/web
